adql:
SELECT source_id, ra, dec, parallax, parallax_over_error, ruwe,
       phot_g_mean_mag, bp_rp, teff_gspphot, logg_gspphot
FROM gaiadr3.gaia_source
WHERE teff_gspphot BETWEEN 3900 AND 5300
  AND logg_gspphot > 4.3
  AND ruwe < 1.4
  AND parallax_over_error > 10
  AND phot_g_mean_mag < 13.0
registered_core_cuts: Teff 3900-5300 K; logg>4.3; RUWE<1.4; parallax_over_error>10; G<13.0

ms_box.note: pre-data implementation decision; see AMENDMENTS.md Phase 2

note: Frozen K-dwarf target list for the registered Phase-2 search (OSF osf.io/2akn3). No light curve is pulled before this is committed.
